source_jobs.title: Account Executive
source_jobs.description:
About AirDNA
 
AirDNA began with a big dream in a balmy California garage in 2015. Since then, the technology startup has grown into the leading provider of data and business intelligence for the multi-billion-dollar travel and short-term rental industry, with offices in New York, Denver and Barcelona and team members around the world.

Our self-serve platform equips Airbnb hosts and property managers with the smart, competitive insights they need to succeed in an ever-evolving market. We also arm enterprise clients with custom reports and in-depth dashboards so they can scale and invest strategically. Our customers include hundreds of top financial institutions, real estate companies, vacation rental managers, and destination marketing organizations around the world.

We track the daily performance of over 15 million listings on Airbnb, Vrbo, and Booking.com across 120,000 global markets. Hundreds of thousands of partner properties further inform our proprietary algorithms, producing the most accurate and comprehensive short-term rental dataset in the world.
In 2024, AirDNA acquired Uplisting, a powerful property management software that helps hosts and operators manage listings across Airbnb, Vrbo, and other platforms. With features like channel management, automated messaging, dynamic pricing, task coordination, and financial reporting, Uplisting expands our mission to support every stage of the short-term rental journey — from investment to operations.
 
The AirDNA team
 
We’re a curious, driven, and kind group of humans who genuinely love what we do. Our values — Happy, Hungry, Honest — guide how we show up for our customers and for each other.
Want to see what that looks like in action? You’ll get a feel once you meet us.
We welcome applicants from all backgrounds and encourage you to apply even if you don’t check every box. Passion, potential, and perspective matter here.
 
The Account Executive Role at AirDNA:
 
You’ll jump into a fast-growing, high-impact AE role where you’ll own the full sales cycle - from inbound qualification to outbound hustle and closing high-value deals. You’ll be a key player in scaling our customer base in the Property Manager (PM) space across global markets.

source_jobs.title: Account Executive - DMO
source_jobs.description:
About AirDNA
We built AirDNA to solve a problem: how do you make smart short-term rental decisions when there’s too much guesswork and not enough good data?
What started in a garage in California in 2015 is now a global team helping thousands of people — from aspiring hosts to major real estate firms — make confident choices about where to invest, what to charge, and how to grow.
Our mission is simple: give people the tools they need to build freedom through short-term rentals. Whether that means buying their first Airbnb or scaling a portfolio, we’re here to help unlock financial independence and growth.
AirDNA is the leading data and analytics platform for the short term rental industry. We provide market intelligence that powers decisions for property managers, investors, hospitality brands, and destination marketing organizations (DMOs) across the globe. Our data covers millions of listings across 120,000+ markets worldwide.
 
The AirDNA team
 
We’re a curious, driven, and kind group of humans who genuinely love what we do. Our values - Happy, Hungry, Honest - guide how we show up for our customers and for each other. Want to see what that looks like in action? You’ll get a feel once you meet us.
We welcome applicants from all backgrounds and encourage you to apply even if you don’t check every box. Passion, potential, and perspective matter here.
 
The Account Executive - DMO Role at AirDNA:
 
We are looking for a seasoned Account Executive who lives and breathes the DMO world. This is not a role where you learn the industry on the job. We need someone who already has deep relationships with DMO leaders, understands their challenges, and can walk into any conference room or stage and command credibility.
You will own the full sales cycle for US DMOs, from prospecting through close, with a $500K annual new business quota. This is 100% outbound. No BDR support, no inbound leads. You build your own pipeline through your network, conferences, and personal brand.

source_jobs.title: Content Marketer, Enterprise Sales
source_jobs.description:
About AirDNA
 
AirDNA began with a big dream in a balmy California garage in 2015. Since then, the technology startup has grown into the leading provider of data and business intelligence for the multi-billion-dollar travel and short-term rental industry, with offices in New York, Denver and Barcelona and team members around the world.

Our self-serve platform equips Airbnb hosts and property managers with the smart, competitive insights they need to succeed in an ever-evolving market. We also arm enterprise clients with custom reports and in-depth dashboards so they can scale and invest strategically. Our customers include hundreds of top financial institutions, real estate companies, vacation rental managers, and destination marketing organizations around the world.

We track the daily performance of over 15 million listings on Airbnb, Vrbo, and Booking.com across 120,000 global markets. Hundreds of thousands of partner properties further inform our proprietary algorithms, producing the most accurate and comprehensive short-term rental dataset in the world.
In 2024, AirDNA acquired Uplisting, a powerful property management software that helps hosts and operators manage listings across Airbnb, Vrbo, and other platforms. With features like channel management, automated messaging, dynamic pricing, task coordination, and financial reporting, Uplisting expands our mission to support every stage of the short-term rental journey — from investment to operations.
 
The AirDNA team
 
We’re a curious, driven, and kind group of humans who genuinely love what we do. Our values — Happy, Hungry, Honest — guide how we show up for our customers and for each other.
Want to see what that looks like in action? You’ll get a feel once you meet us.
We welcome applicants from all backgrounds and encourage you to apply even if you don’t check every box. Passion, potential, and perspective matter here.
 
The Role:
AirDNA’s enterprise sales organization is where the company is placing its biggest growth bets and it needs content that performs. We’re looking for a Content Marketer who will sit inside the sales org, not in a marketing silo, and work directly with the sellers and account managers who use content every day to win and retain enterprise business.
As the Content Marketer, Enterprise Sales you’ll support three distinct teams: Advanced Data Solutions (ADS), Property Management (PM), and Destination Marketing Organizations (DMO). Each has its own buyers, sales motion, and competitive landscape. Your job is to make all three more effective through content that moves deals forward, keeps clients engaged, and positions AirDNA as the leading intelligence partner in each vertical.
This role sits within the Marketing team and reports to the Head of Marketing, with dotted lines into the Leader of Advanced Data Solutions and the New Business Manager. Your success is measured in pipeline, closed deals, and client retention  not content volume.

source_jobs.title: Founding Revenue Manager, Adapt
source_jobs.description:
About AirDNA
AirDNA began with a big dream in a balmy California garage in 2015. Since then, the technology startup has grown into the leading provider of data and business intelligence for the multi-billion-dollar travel and short-term rental industry, with offices in New York, Denver and Barcelona and team members around the world.
Our self-serve platform equips Airbnb hosts and property managers with the smart, competitive insights they need to succeed in an ever-evolving market. We also arm enterprise clients with custom reports and in-depth dashboards so they can scale and invest strategically. Our customers include hundreds of top financial institutions, real estate companies, vacation rental managers, and destination marketing organizations around the world.
We track the daily performance of over 15 million listings on Airbnb, Vrbo, and Booking.com across 120,000 global markets. Hundreds of thousands of partner properties further inform our proprietary algorithms, producing the most accurate and comprehensive short-term rental dataset in the world.
 
The AirDNA team
We genuinely live and breathe our company values: Happy, Hungry, Honest - Be Curious, Be Customer-Obsessed, Take Action, Act with Ownership, and Enjoy the Ride. People who are ready to exemplify these values are especially encouraged to apply.
Want to see what that looks like in action? You’ll get a feel once you meet us. We welcome applicants from all backgrounds and encourage you to apply even if you don’t check every box. Passion, potential, and perspective matter here.
 
The Role 
Adapt is AirDNA's new dynamic pricing and revenue management product, and it's launching now. We built Adapt to make a revenue manager's job easier — surfacing what they need to know when they need to know it, distilling the inputs that drive the right pricing decisions into a clear, easy-to-understand view, and leveraging AI to make pricing simpler, not harder.
This is a three-pillar role. First, you'll be a public face of Adapt externally — on stage, on podcasts, on LinkedIn, in webinars, and in the competitive narrative — with AirDNA's marketing team in your corner. Second, you'll lead the customer experience for Adapt, building a team to support onboarding, success, and retention as we scale. Third, you'll partner with our product and data science teams as the structured voice of the customer, helping shape where Adapt goes next.
You'll be a player-coach from day one — hands-on in demos, onboardings, and customer calls while setting the playbook a future team will execute against. You'll inherit our beta customers right away and hire your first CS/onboarding lead within roughly six months.

source_jobs.title: Social Media Manager
source_jobs.description:
About AirDNA
 
AirDNA began with a big dream in a balmy California garage in 2015. Since then, the technology startup has grown into the leading provider of data and business intelligence for the multi-billion-dollar travel and short-term rental industry, with offices in New York, Denver and Barcelona and team members around the world.

Our self-serve platform equips Airbnb hosts and property managers with the smart, competitive insights they need to succeed in an ever-evolving market. We also arm enterprise clients with custom reports and in-depth dashboards so they can scale and invest strategically. Our customers include hundreds of top financial institutions, real estate companies, vacation rental managers, and destination marketing organizations around the world.

We track the daily performance of over 15 million listings on Airbnb, Vrbo, and Booking.com across 120,000 global markets. Hundreds of thousands of partner properties further inform our proprietary algorithms, producing the most accurate and comprehensive short-term rental dataset in the world.
In 2024, AirDNA acquired Uplisting, a powerful property management software that helps hosts and operators manage listings across Airbnb, Vrbo, and other platforms. With features like channel management, automated messaging, dynamic pricing, task coordination, and financial reporting, Uplisting expands our mission to support every stage of the short-term rental journey — from investment to operations.
 
The AirDNA team
We’re a curious, driven, and kind group of humans who genuinely love what we do. Our values — Happy, Hungry, Honest — guide how we show up for our customers and for each other.
Want to see what that looks like in action? You’ll get a feel once you meet us.
We welcome applicants from all backgrounds and encourage you to apply even if you don’t check every box. Passion, potential, and perspective matter here.
 
The Role
AirDNA gives this role something most social teams never have: a constant, ownable stream of proprietary data that no competitor can replicate. Market trends before they hit the news, demand spikes tied to world events, numbers that journalists quote and investors act on. The raw material is exceptional, and the job is making it travel.
The Social Media Manager owns the system that turns all of that into compounding organic growth. Organic social across every channel, YouTube as an acquisition channel, proprietary podcast distribution, creator amplification with real measurement behind it, and executive thought leadership for AirDNA executives. It is an established function with channel presence and existing momentum, with significant room to build something bigger.
The role ships independently with full ownership over creative direction, production spend, tools, and content strategy. It reports to the Sr. Comms Manager, works alongside a dedicated research team of PhD economists and a PR and Content team already producing at scale, and sits inside the Acquisition pillar alongside Creative, Lifecycle, PMM, and Community. Every major activity is expected to tie back to traffic, sign-ups, or pipeline.

notes: No tech roles posted, high volume of sales and marketing roles
